alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in dark.
cleavage agent: digested by Lys-C (Wako, at a 1:100 enzyme/protein ratio) for 2 hrs at RT.
fractionation method: Samples were desalted and fractioned by bRPLC (basic pH reversed phase HPLC) on a ZORBAX 300 Extend-C18 column.
fragmentation method: using a top 15 HCD (higher-energy collisional dissociation) method.
instrument: Samples were analyzed on an Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer.
labeling: using a TMT (tandem mass tag)-based, multiplexed quantitative mass spectrometric approach.
reduction reagent: reduced with 2 mM DTT for 10 min.
reduction concentration: reduced with 2 mM DTT for 10 min.
